reviews.author: NKLS J.
reviews.text: Very efficient, great work, great customer service.

reviews.author: Isaac M.
reviews.text: He was fast, job was smooth and easy. Very professional and well mannered.

reviews.author: Bbyshar
reviews.text: Great job very happy with the work. He came very fast. Before and after pictures.

reviews.author: Vlad N.
reviews.text: The best customer service. He came so quick. Super responsible person.

notes: 24/7 mobile tire service, Midtown Atlanta. Small but all 5-star. Reviews already wired inline in the HTML's review-feed marquee section — this reviews.json reflects that data as the structured artifact per contract. Thin review count (4) but all positive; not review-thin enough to trigger no-gallery pattern.

capture_attempts.reason: 4 verbatim reviews with named reviewers + dates extracted from HTML
